/stats-collector.mjs(2,14): error TS1340: Module './runner.js' does not refer to a type, but is used as a type here. Did you mean 'typeof import('./runner.js')'?
/stats-collector.mjs(9,31): error TS7006: Parameter 'runner' implicitly has an 'any' type.


==== /runner.js (0 errors) ====
    function Runner() {}
    Runner.constants = {
        EVENT_RUN_BEGIN: "begin",
    };
    module.exports = Runner;
    
==== /stats-collector.mjs (2 errors) ====

     * @typedef {import('./runner.js')} Runner
                 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

     */
    
    import Runner from "./runner.js";
    
    const { EVENT_RUN_BEGIN } = Runner.constants;
    
    function createStatsCollector(runner) {}

!!! error TS7006: Parameter 'runner' implicitly has an 'any' type.
